name: ai-expansionist
description: An AI nation with a strongly expansionist doctrine starts with mexico_yucatan. Three unclaimed territories are adjacent: belize and el_salvador indirectly. Expected: the AI's expand_claim action scores highly (0.3 + 0.6×expansionist), so the AI claims adjacent unclaimed territory (belize) within a few ticks. Over 10 ticks the AI should expand to both belize and mexico_yucatan's other neighbors if unclaimed. The expansionist AI also has elevated militarist weight from the doctrine derivation formula.
